description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build job that runs in the build stage using the node:8 Docker image and the docker-executor tag. The job should execute the following shell commands in order: curl https://install.meteor.com/ --insecure | sh, NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 npm install, mkdir .build, and NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 meteor --allow-superuser build .build --architecture os.linux.x86_64. After the script, archive the .build/ directory as an artifact named power5online.tar.gz that expires after 24 months. No additional services, caches, or rules are required.
